title: Tiffany Grant doesnt suck anymore do I still have to die
display_title: Tiffany Grant doesnt suck anymore do I still have to die
wikitext:
[]: Tiffany Grant doesn't suck anymore, do I still have to die?             Quote Post by SAWgunner » Sat Jun 25, 2011 2:54 am About a year before Rebuild 2.0 came out, I stated on this board that if Tiffany Grant voiced Asuka I would commit seppuku in the lobby of Funimation's headquarters. While the Tiffster has, indeed reprised her role as Asuka, she doesn't suck anymore. I guess she took acting classes or something. Anyway, since the whole point of the seppuku was to escape a world that Tiffany Grant made not worth living in, and to send a message to Funimation for bringing that world into being, then there really isn't any point to dieing now because Grant didn't ruin my life after all. However, I still swore an oath to do it, and I even started a death cult to do it with me. Since a man is only as good as his word, and I don't want to look bad in front of my death cult, should I just got to Funimation and make the janitors earn their pay after all?

[]:             Quote Post by MugwumpHasNoLiver » Sat Jun 25, 2011 3:22 am Don't forget to have one of your followers film it and put it up on YouTube.

[]:             Quote Post by BornIn1142 » Sat Jun 25, 2011 4:42 am Well, it's not like it was a very demanding role.

[]:             Quote Post by Someone » Sat Jun 25, 2011 4:47 am Wait till Rebuild 3.0 and 4.0 come out. (that makes it more likely that you will die of old age)

[]:             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Sat Jun 25, 2011 8:56 am What, is the even serious? Just forget about it and live life to its fullest.

[]:             Quote Post by Defectron » Sat Jun 25, 2011 10:32 am FreakyFilmFan4ever wrote: What, is the even serious? Just forget about it and live life to its fullest.

[]: Re: Tiffany Grant doesn't suck anymore, do I still have to d             Quote Post by THE Hal E. Burton 9000 » Sat Jun 25, 2011 12:23 pm SAWgunner wrote: While the Tiffster has, indeed reprised her role as Asuka, she doesn't suck anymore. I guess she took acting classes or something.

[]:             Quote Post by tomrule123 » Sat Jun 25, 2011 2:43 pm Ok, this is just silly. Tiffany Grant might be worse than the Japanese version of Asuka, but... that's just it. She just acts to get paid and seems to enjoy portraying that character in her style. If you hate her so much, why not just don't listen to the english dub and listen to the- ... ok, you get the drill. Now please, stop thinking about this and use your life to the fullest.

[]:             Quote Post by esselfortium » Sat Jun 25, 2011 2:57 pm I like Tiffany Grant's Asuka.

[]:             Quote Post by The Triforce Fighter » Sat Jun 25, 2011 3:49 pm esselfortium wrote: I like Tiffany Grant's Asuka.

[]:             Quote Post by backseatjesus » Sat Jun 25, 2011 6:12 pm Just lie back and think of England.

[]:             Quote Post by SAWgunner » Sat Jun 25, 2011 6:29 pm Defectron wrote: I shouldnt have to say this but if you took this topic seriously... http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=SoVdUBDdpc4

[]:             Quote Post by Trajan » Sat Jun 25, 2011 6:45 pm You should just set yourself on fire, that's what all the trendy kids are doing. But don't, just go back on your word like everyone else does.

[]:             Quote Post by child of Lilith » Sat Jun 25, 2011 8:34 pm You should keep your word, SAWgunner. . .

[]:             Quote Post by Seele00TextOnly » Sat Jun 25, 2011 9:53 pm +1 to everyone supporting Grant's Asuka all along. She did great the first time and has only continued to improve in EoE and to accommodate the ... let me try to be neutral and say 'altered use' of the character in the new popcorn flicks.

[]:             Quote Post by gatotsu911 » Sat Jun 25, 2011 11:04 pm Trajan wrote: You should just set yourself on fire, that's what all the trendy kids are doing. But don't, just go back on your word like everyone else does.

[]:             Quote Post by Tarnsman » Sun Jun 26, 2011 1:44 am I think keeping your word is what is important here. Regardless of whether or not you did or did not like her performance, you stated that if she returned there would be ritual suicide on your part. Nothing in that factored in the quality of the performance. So yes, you do still have to die.

[]: Re: Tiffany Grant doesn't suck anymore, do I still have to d             Quote Post by TehDonutKing » Sun Jun 26, 2011 1:35 pm SAWgunner wrote: About a year before Rebuild 2.0 came out, I stated on this board that if Tiffany Grant voiced Asuka I would commit seppuku in the lobby of Funimation's headquarters.

[]:             Quote Post by Shogo-Kun » Sun Jun 26, 2011 3:24 pm Everyone on this thread has problems and should seek threapy...

[]:             Quote Post by child of Lilith » Sun Jun 26, 2011 3:29 pm Does that include you?
